-- 1 of 3 --

The Seed Launch Part 1
!
Now we're going to talk about the seed launch and I know a lot of people are really
excited about this. The seed launch is an absolutely great way to start. It's a great
place to start. This is where you start if you have no list, no product. It's the absolute
easiest way to create a product.
!
And because it's a very interactive process, and you end up working fairly closely with
people as you go through it. It's great for getting testimonials and case studies,
because you naturally build this relationship with the people that are going through it.
!
It's an easy, simple launch to do and it can lead to a much bigger launch. In the
Business Launch Formula, I talked about how I started this business of teaching
product launches, this Product Launch Formula business. I started it with a seed launch.
It's how I created a great product right out of the gate.
!
Not many of us are trained educators, not many of us know instinctively how to teach
whatever we're experts on. And there is this thing called the Curse of Knowledge and it
is the idea that whatever you're going to be teaching about, whatever you're creating
your product about, you are some type of an expert, and as an expert, it's very hard to
remember what it was like to be a beginner.
!
Whether it's mountain biking or playing the guitar or playing tennis or building a social
media presence or whatever it is, you're an expert and it's hard to remember when you
first started out. That's just the way it is, because you have so much knowledge and the
beginner stuff, you don't even have to think about. So it's almost like breathing.
!
There was a time when walking was very difficult for you and for me. When we were
about one year old, walking was really difficult, but now we don't have to think about it.
We don't have to think about all the things we do to walk across the room. If you're
teaching tennis, you've just forgotten how many things have to happen to actually hit
that ball.
!
The seed launch helps you avoid that Curse of Knowledge, because it's very interactive.
All the way through, you are doing teleseminars or webinars and each time you are
surveying people before the calls and after the calls. You are finding out where the gaps
are – what you need to be teaching, what they really want to know, what you have to
revisit and teach better.
!
And that's how I created a great product with Product Launch Formula right out of the
gate. My very first version was awesome, because it really wasn't my first version, it
was the second version. The seed launch I had done for it, those first six people that I
sold it to, they taught me how to teach. They taught me what my blind spots were as
an expert. That's why seed launches are great.
!

-- 2 of 3 --

You make money, you get paid before the product creation. You get paid right up front,
then you create the product. You get those testimonials and those case studies and you
just create a great product. It's awesome.
!
The only thing is that it isn't just for beginners, it's absolutely not just for beginners. If
you have a current business, but you have an idea for a new product and you want to
roll that out and you want to get paid before you create the product. You want to hold
your feet to the fire so that you actually create the product.
!
A lot of us are really good at procrastinating when it comes to product creation. Yes,
right, sometimes I've been known to procrastinate a little bit on product creation. This
way you get paid and now you have to create the product. My friend, Eben Pagan, calls
this an inevitability thinking. You set up a situation where you have to perform.
!
Seed launches are great if you have a current business and you want to create a new
product, you want to test out a product idea. I just did a seed launch a few months
ago. It was absolutely awesome. It was about a topic that I've been teaching for years
and years and I've had tons of clients and students go through, but I put together what
I called a “Deep Dive.” I took this topic and I created a super deep level training or a
higher level training for this topic.
!
I learned so much about my clients and where they were at in their current lives and
where they were at in terms of using my teaching. It helped me learn an incredible
amount about that topic and about my overall client base. It was really great. I brought
in a bunch of money, it helped me create a great product that I'm going to be using in
the future, and it helped me learn an unbelievable amount.
!
Seed launches are great, whether you have an existing business and you want to roll
out a new product idea and get paid before you create the product. They are fantastic if
you have no list and no product. They are on the way simple end of product launches,
of all the different types of product launches, they're far simpler. They're easy to do.
!
If you're just starting out, you absolutely want to use a seed launch. I've got some
great examples for you, so let's just go ahead and dig right into them.
